title: xerochrysum collierianum
intro: Xerochrysum collierianum, also known as the Billy Button, is a flowering plant native to Australia, characterized by its small white flowers and a strong, pungent scent. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Xerochrysum collierianum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
